summary: Tested multi-select dropdown filters with search bar in admin panel (Users + Customers tables). All new features implemented correctly: Partner Code and Modules columns in Users table have multi-select dropdown with always-visible search bar; Email column in Customers table changed from text search to multi-select dropdown with search bar. All existing filters retain search bar. Filtering and sorting work as expected.

design_issues.screen: Admin Users - Partner Org column filter
issues: Pre-existing issue (not related to this feature): Partner Org dropdown filter shows no options. Table renders u.tenant_name but filter options compute from u.org_name || u.partner_name — field name mismatch. 'Test Partner Org' visible in table but doesn't appear in filter dropdown. Sort (A→Z/Z→A) still works.

action_items: Pre-existing: Partner Org filter in Users table has no options because orgOpts computes from u.org_name||u.partner_name but API returns u.tenant_name. Fix orgOpts to use u.tenant_name if that's the correct field.
critical_code_review_comments: ColHeader.tsx: Search bar (Input) is always rendered at top of dropdown section (not conditional) - correct implementation per spec.
UsersTab.tsx L232: partnerCodeOpts uses u.tenant_code which matches table display - correct.
UsersTab.tsx L231: orgOpts uses u.org_name||u.partner_name but table uses u.tenant_name — pre-existing mismatch, filter will have no options.
CustomersTab.tsx L50-56: emailFilter is now string[] (multi-select) and L295 uses filterType='dropdown' — correctly changed from text to multi-select.

success_rate.frontend: 95% (9/9 new feature tests passed; 1 pre-existing issue noted)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin login: partner code = 'automate-accounts', then admin@automateaccounts.local / ChangeMe123!. Admin panel at /admin. Users table (PEOPLE > Users): columns NAME/EMAIL, ROLE, PARTNER ORG, PARTNER CODE, MODULES, STATUS all have dropdown filters with search bar. Customers table (PEOPLE > Customers): columns NAME, EMAIL, STATE/PROVINCE, COUNTRY, STATUS, PAYMENT METHODS, PARTNER all have dropdown filters. Email is now multi-select dropdown (not text input). All filter search bars always visible. Pre-existing issue: Partner Org filter in Users has no selectable options (field name mismatch).

test_1_customers_email_multiselect.description: Email column in Customers table shows multi-select dropdown with search bar at top

test_2_users_partner_code_multiselect.description: Partner Code column in Users table shows dropdown filter with search bar, options: [testpartner242]

test_3_users_modules_multiselect.description: Modules column in Users table shows dropdown filter with search bar. No options (both users are super admins with 'Full access', so no module-specific permissions). 'No results' shown correctly.
test_3_users_modules_multiselect.note: Expected empty - both users are super admins

test_4_sort_modules.description: Sort A→Z works on Modules column

test_5_sort_partner_code.description: Sort A→Z works on Partner Code column

test_6_users_name_email_existing.description: Name/Email column still has dropdown filter with search bar. Options: [Partner Admin, Rushabh Kothari]

test_7_users_partner_org_existing.description: Partner Org column still has dropdown filter UI with search bar, but no selectable options due to pre-existing field name mismatch (u.org_name vs u.tenant_name)

test_8_customers_name_existing.description: Customers Name column has dropdown filter with search bar. Options: [Address Test Co, Address Test User]

test_9_customers_state_existing.description: Customers State/Province column has dropdown filter with search bar. Options: [British Columbia]

test_10_customers_payment_existing.description: Customers Payment Methods column has dropdown filter with search bar. Options: [None assigned]

test_11_customers_partner_existing.description: Customers Partner column has dropdown filter with search bar. Options: [testpartner242]
